title: Principal Frontend Developer at LG Soft India Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Principal Frontend Developer at LG Soft India Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
LG Soft India Holdings Services, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Frontend Developer for our Bhubaneswar operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About LG Soft India Holdings Services:
LG Soft India Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with LG Soft India Holdings Services!
